_README: OPTIONAL local taxonomy override for GraphiQuest. Copy this file to
'graphiquest.taxonomy.local.json' (gitignored, never shipped) and edit it to
give YOUR repo a bespoke concept / slice / region vocabulary. With NO local
file present, GraphiQuest classifies every repo with the built-in GENERIC
taxonomy (Frontend / Backend / Scripts / Docs / Tests / Config / Data / Assets /
Workflows / Other + top-level-directory slices). This example is intentionally
GENERIC (a domain-oriented grouping) -- it ships only as documentation of the
schema; it is NOT loaded. See docs/GRAPHIQUEST_TAXONOMY.md.
Every key is optional. 'pattern'/'extra'/'path'/'label' are case-insensitive
regular expressions matched against the node's source path (or label).

Overview.hint: Pick any slice; search the whole graph.
